resolved_from_round1.title: CA private key not deleted on install_ca_cert failure
resolved_from_round1.resolution: Fixed in round 1 fix commit: delete_ca_key_files(confdir) and delete_ca_public_cert(confdir) now called in the failure branch before return (None, None).

resolved_from_round1.title: _last_flow_time written without lock
resolved_from_round1.resolution: Fixed: _last_flow_time write and is_target_domain check moved inside with self._lock block. Lock acquired for the full relevant section of request().

resolved_from_round1.title: Stale CA cert in trust store if uninstall_ca_cert fails
resolved_from_round1.resolution: Partially mitigated: old_thumbprint captured before update and included in warning log message for manual cleanup reference. No automated deferred cleanup, but acceptable given the private key is already deleted.

resolved_from_round1.title: sys.exit(1) in _start_mitmproxy bypasses except Exception in _restart_mitmproxy
resolved_from_round1.resolution: Fixed: except SystemExit added before except Exception in _restart_mitmproxy, with appropriate error logging. Monitor thread no longer dies silently on proxy startup timeout during restart.
